slides.primaryTitle: FANPAGE LEADER AT CHUYỆN Ở S
body: Built an action plan and content direction aligned with the department's communication goals.
Developed engaging communication messages and content to promote internal activities and updates to members.
Analyzed content performance and communication trends to continuously improve audience engagement.
Grew the fanpage by 1,000+ followers and achieved an average reach of 1,000+ per post within the year.
keyHighlights: Achieved an average reach of 1,000+ per post within the year

body: Developed detailed plans for each phase of the project.
Researched trending topics and reference materials to enhance content creativity.
Coordinated with Content and Event teams to ensure accurate, timely, and aligned content delivery.

Developed communication ideas and created engaging content series aligned with the project's overall direction, achieving 100+ engagements per post within the internal group and attracting 100+ members to participate on the event day.
keyHighlights: Achieved 100+ engagements per post within the internal group
Attracted 100+ members to participate on the event day

body: Developed plans for each phase of the project, setting KPIs for reach, engagement.
Researched member insights to propose trend-aligned content.
Contributed to brief development, content review, caption writing, and PR.
Achieved an average of +7,000 reach per post (peaking at 23,000+), grew the fanpage by +200 followers, and received positive feedback from members and alumni.
